codeExamples.emojicode:
📦 sockets 🏠

💭 Emojicode HTTP Client
💭 Compile: emojicodec example.🍇 -o example
💭 Run: ./example

🏁 🍇
  💭 Connection settings
  🔤localhost🔤 ➡️ host
  3010 ➡️ port
  🔤/scene🔤 ➡️ path

  💭 Query parameters
  🔤clientId=fvtt_d3db244ce1d8af0b🔤 ➡️ clientId
  🔤?🧲clientId🧲🔤 ➡️ queryString

  💭 Request body
  🔤{"data":{"name":"test-scene","width":1000,"height":1000,"grid":{"size":100}}}🔤 ➡️ body

  💭 Build HTTP request
  🔤POST /scene🧲queryString🧲 HTTP/1.1❌r❌nHost: localhost:3010❌r❌nx-api-key: a3cad2343dc06dec39d967c1a836d426c754e7edec533be2ce5a3e8139d0a67f❌r❌nContent-Type: application/json❌r❌nContent-Length: 77❌r❌n❌r❌n🧲body🧲🔤 ➡️ request

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response
  🍺 👂 socket 4096❗ ➡️ data
  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
  🚪 socket❗
🍉

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/scene'
params = {
    'clientId': 'fvtt_d3db244ce1d8af0b',
    'all': 'true'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'a3cad2343dc06dec39d967c1a836d426c754e7edec533be2ce5a3e8139d0a67f'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/scene'
params = {
    'clientId': 'fvtt_d3db244ce1d8af0b',
    'sceneId': '2qQUvnbEhK3gO9eK'
}
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.delete(
    url,
    params=params,
    headers={
        'x-api-key': 'a3cad2343dc06dec39d967c1a836d426c754e7edec533be2ce5a3e8139d0a67f'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
